items: Call to Order
Roll Call
Welcome
Changes to the Agenda
Approval of the Agenda (Action Required)
Public Comment
Approval of the Bond Program Consent Items

Approval of the Industrial Hygienist Services agreements with ProTech Consulting & Engineering for the HVAC Upgrade projects at Taft, Roosevelt, Hoover, Adelante Selby,  and campuses with temporary AC units.
Bond Program Action Items
Discussion Items
Discussion on the Process for a National Search for the Next Superintendent of Schools
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 1112: Media Relations
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 1114: District-Sponsored Social Media
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 3320: Claims And Actions Against The District
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 5145.13: Response To Immigration Enforcement
First Reading and Discussion of Board Bylaw 9010: Public Statements
Approval of Consent Items (Action Required)
Approval of the August 12, 2025, Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2025–26 School Year
Approval of Kennedy Middle School Field Trip to Yosemite – October 19 - 24, 2025
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and One Life Counseling for the 2025-2026 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and College Advising Prep for the 2025-2026 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and One Life Counseling Center for the 2025-2026 School Year for Services during the Extended Learning Programs
Adoption of Resolution No. 6 to Engage a Third-Party Administrator for the District’s existing 403b and  457b Voluntary Deferred Compensation Retirement Plans
Action Items (Action Required)
Readoption of the Local Control and Accountability Plan (LCAP) for the 2025/2026 School Year
Approval of the Expanded Learning Opportunities Program Guide for 2025-2026
Adoption of Resolutions 4 and 5, Approval of Sole Sourcing Resolution and Resolution to Authorize Technology Procurement under PCC 20118.2 for EV Charging Stations Across District Sites
Adoption of Resolution No. 7, Approval of Education Code and Title V Options for Teaching Assignments
Board and Superintendent Reports
Information
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - July 2025
Correspondence
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Board of Trustees Meeting Calendar
Adjournment (Action Required)

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 8.2 (First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 1112: Media Relations) was pulled from the agenda at the start of the meeting during the Changes to the Agenda section.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So do we have a motion to approve the consent agenda with out 9.2? So move seconded. All in favor? Aye.
